In Re: Recruitment of Visually Impaired in Judicial Services
Submissions of the learned counsel for High Court of Madhya Pradesh
24. According to the learned counsel, totally four posts were reserved 
for physically handicapped persons under the unreserved category. 
The appellant got qualified in the preliminary examination and was 
also successful in the main examinations. As per the selection criteria 
in the advertisement dated 21.12.2021, there was a requirement 
to secure minimum 40% marks in the interview to be eligible for 
consideration. Accordingly, a candidate securing 20 or more marks 
in the interview was alone eligible for consideration for appointment. 
Since the appellant secured 18.1 marks out of 50 in the interview, 
and thus was not considered for appointment.
24.1. It was further submitted that the contention of the appellant
